chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-401 of 2024 (Bahria Town Karachi (Pvt.) Limited vs. Province of Sindh & others) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.1913/2024 2. For order on CMA No.1914/2024 3. For hearing of main case 23.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for petitioner ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- The case of petitioner (Bahria Town Karachi (Pvt.) Limited) is that he attempted to file a suit before respondent No.2 (The Sindh Anti-Encroachment Tribunal) but the later refused to even receive the plaint or pass any order either rejecting or admitting the suit. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied, if direction is issued to respondent No.2 to entertain his suit and pass any order either admitting the suit or rejecting it, so that, he could avail remedy before next forum in accordance with law. 3. Mr. Ziauddin Junejo, Addl: PG Sindh has voluntarily appeared and submitted that he would have no objection, if the request of the petitioner is entertained and respondent No.2 is directed to pass some order on the suit being filed by the petitioner in accordance with law. 5. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in above terms with direction to respondent No.2 to pass some speaking judicial order either admitting or rejecting the suit, if it is not otherwise maintainable, within a period of one month on presentation of the plaint. This petition is disposed of in above terms along with pending application(s).

Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in above terms with direction to respondent No.2 to pass some speaking judicial order either admitting or rejecting the suit, if it is not otherwise maintainable, within a period of one month on presentation of the plaint. This petition is disposed of in above terms along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
